text: Hi, I just got 6 emails about login attempts. I didn't try to log in. Now I can't access my account and I see a new phone number on file ending in 0192. Please help ASAP.

Agent: How can I help?
Client: My account shows a withdrawal to 'Bank of X' for $9,850 that I didn't request. It says pending. I only ever withdraw to my RBC account. Can you cancel it?

Subject: URGENT
I changed phones yesterday. Today I see 3 new crypto addresses added. I also received a text with a code I didn't request. Please lock my account. I'm traveling and can't do a video call until tomorrow.

I want to file a complaint. Your app showed my portfolio was down 12% this morning and I panicked and sold. Later it corrected and now it shows down 2%. I want compensation for the loss due to incorrect information.

Client: I think someone at Wealthsimple looked at my account. I got a call from a random number that knew my exact holdings and my full name. How is that possible? I never shared that. I want to know if my data was accessed.

I placed 40 orders in 10 minutes and then my account was restricted. I'm a day trader. This is unacceptable. Also, my friend said you can 'spoof' with small orders but I don't know what that means. Remove restrictions now.

Subject: Can't verify
I tried to verify my identity 5 times and it keeps failing. My name has a hyphen and the camera won't focus. I need access to my paycheque deposit this week.
I deposited $25,000 and bought BTC. Now you want 'source of funds'. It's from my business cash sales. I can send screenshots of my e-transfers but I don't have invoices for everything.

Client: I'm retiring in 6 months. Why is my portfolio still 90% equities? I told the onboarding quiz I'm low risk.
Agent: …
Client: I feel misled. If markets drop, I'm going to blame Wealthsimple.

Subject: Account locked
I got locked out after logging in from a hotel Wi-Fi in Vancouver. Support asked for documents. I'm the account owner but my passport is expired. Can you unlock it if I answer security questions?
